ddls:
CREATE TABLE "packets" (
  "packet_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each packet */,
  "timestamp" REAL /* Time in seconds since the start of transmission */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address the packet was sent to */,
  "data" TEXT /* Data contained in the packet */,
  "direction" TEXT /* Direction of the packet (e.g., Read, Write) */,
  "ack_status" TEXT /* Acknowledgment status of the packet (e.g., ACK, NAK) */,
  "packet_size" INTEGER /* Size of the packet in bytes */,
  "transmission_protocol" TEXT /* Protocol used for transmission (e.g., TCP, UDP, ICMP) */,
  "source_port" INTEGER /* Source port number */,
  "destination_port" INTEGER /* Destination port number */,
  "packet_sequence_number" INTEGER /* Sequence number of the packet */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("packet_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_packets_ack_status FOREIGN KEY ("ack_status") REFERENCES acknowledgment_statuses ("status_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_packets_direction FOREIGN KEY ("direction") REFERENCES packet_directions ("direction_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_packets_data FOREIGN KEY ("data") REFERENCES data_types ("data_type_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_packets_address FOREIGN KEY ("address") REFERENCES addresses ("address")
)

CREATE TABLE "addresses" (
  "address_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each address */,
  "address" TEXT /* The network address */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the address, such as device type */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device associated with the address */,
  "location" TEXT /* Physical or logical location of the device */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("address_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_types" (
  "data_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data type */,
  "data_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the data type (e.g., numeric, text) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description explaining the data type */,
  "data_format" TEXT /* Format of the data (e.g., JSON, XML, CSV) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "packet_directions" (
  "direction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each direction */,
  "direction_name" TEXT /* Name of the packet direction (e.g., Read, Write) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the direction */,
  "protocol" TEXT /* Protocol associated with the direction */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("direction_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "acknowledgment_statuses" (
  "ack_status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each acknowledgment status */,
  "status_name" TEXT /* Name of the acknowledgment status (e.g., ACK, NAK) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the status */,
  "resolution" TEXT /* Resolution steps for the status */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ack_status_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "network_devices" (
  "device_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each device */,
  "device_name" TEXT /* Name of the device */,
  "address_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the address associated with the device */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of the device (e.g., Router, Switch) */,
  "firmware_version" TEXT /* Current firmware version of the device */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("device_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_network_devices_address_id FOREIGN KEY ("address_id") REFERENCES addresses ("address_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, analyst) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user account */,
  "last_login_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who accessed the packet data */,
  "packet_id" INTEGER /* ID of the packet accessed */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of the access */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action performed (e.g., view, delete) */,
  "access_result" TEXT /* Result of the access (e.g., success, failure) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_packet_id FOREIGN KEY ("packet_id") REFERENCES packets ("packet_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "packet_id" INTEGER /* ID of the packet associated with the alert */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of alert (e.g., anomaly, performance) */,
  "alert_time" TEXT /* Time the alert was generated */,
  "resolved" INTEGER /* Indicates if the alert has been resolved */,
  "resolution_time" TEXT /* Timestamp when the alert was resolved */,
  "resolved_by" TEXT /* User who resolved the alert */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_packet_id FOREIGN KEY ("packet_id") REFERENCES packets ("packet_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "packet_analysis" (
  "analysis_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analysis entry */,
  "packet_id" INTEGER /* ID of the packet analyzed */,
  "analysis_result" TEXT /* Result of the analysis */,
  "analysis_time" TEXT /* Time when the analysis was performed */,
  "analyzer_tool" TEXT /* Tool used to perform the analysis */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analysis_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_packet_analysis_packet_id FOREIGN KEY ("packet_id") REFERENCES packets ("packet_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "packet_statistics" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each statistic entry */,
  "packet_id" INTEGER /* ID of the packet associated with the statistics */,
  "total_transmissions" INTEGER /* Total number of transmissions of the packet */,
  "error_count" INTEGER /* Count of errors encountered during transmissions */,
  "avg_response_time" REAL /* Average response time in seconds */,
  "max_response_time" REAL /* Maximum response time in seconds */,
  "min_response_time" REAL /* Minimum response time in seconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_packet_statistics_packet_id FOREIGN KEY ("packet_id") REFERENCES packets ("packet_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "packet_versioning" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version entry */,
  "packet_id" INTEGER /* ID of the associated packet */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the packet */,
  "modified_time" TEXT /* Time when the version was created or modified */,
  "version_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_packet_versioning_packet_id FOREIGN KEY ("packet_id") REFERENCES packets ("packet_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "thresholds" (
  "threshold_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each threshold entry */,
  "packet_id" INTEGER /* ID of the packet associated with the threshold */,
  "threshold_type" TEXT /* Type of threshold (e.g., response time, error rate) */,
  "threshold_value" REAL /* Value of the threshold */,
  "operator" TEXT /* Operator for the threshold (e.g., <, >, =) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("threshold_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_thresholds_packet_id FOREIGN KEY ("packet_id") REFERENCES packets ("packet_id")
)
